use_cases: Displaying filtered image collections in a responsive grid layout
Photo portfolio or gallery showcase with category filtering
E-commerce product image browser with lightbox overlay
Blog or content site image gallery with keyboard navigation
Creative portfolio with animated transitions and image zoom
ai_summary: A responsive image gallery component featuring category filtering, lightbox overlay with keyboard navigation, and smooth animations via Framer Motion. Displays images in a grid with hover effects and supports prev/next navigation within the lightbox modal. Ideal for portfolios, product showcases, or content-heavy media sites.
